mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_template ( id, user_id, template_name, original_filename, original_file_path, storage_type, object_key, public_url, current_filename, current_file_path, current_storage_type, current_object_key, current_public_url, file_type, version, status, layout_fingerprint_json, unsupported_regions_json ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{templateName}, #{originalFilename}, #{originalFilePath}, #{storageType}, #{objectKey}, #{publicUrl}, #{currentFilename}, #{currentFilePath}, #{currentStorageType}, #{currentObjectKey}, #{currentPublicUrl}, #{fileType}, #{version}, #{status}, #{layoutFingerprintJson}, #{unsupportedRegionsJson} )
mapper.update: UPDATE resume_template SET status = #{status}, version = #{version}, layout_fingerprint_json = #{layoutFingerprintJson}, unsupported_regions_json = #{unsupportedRegionsJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE resume_template SET version = #{version}, status = #{status}, current_filename = #{currentFilename}, current_file_path = #{currentFilePath}, current_storage_type = #{currentStorageType}, current_object_key = #{currentObjectKey}, current_public_url = #{currentPublicUrl}, layout_fingerprint_json = #{layoutFingerprintJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, template_name, original_filename, original_file_path, storage_type, object_key, public_url, current_filename, current_file_path, current_storage_type, current_object_key, current_public_url, file_type, version, status, layout_fingerprint_json, unsupported_regions_json, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, template_name, original_filename, original_file_path, storage_type, object_key, public_url, current_filename, current_file_path, current_storage_type, current_object_key, current_public_url, file_type, version, status, layout_fingerprint_json, unsupported_regions_json, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
